assertions.text: Vehicle speed was just under 80 km/h before braking/easing off.
Driver had been easing off (gradually decelerating) for a few seconds before the collision.
Easing off/deceleration occurred while traffic ahead slowed, before the collision.
There were two distinct impacts (two jolts) about one second apart.
The collision reduced the vehicle speed from motorway pace (~just under 80 km/h) to a crawl within two to three seconds.
The vehicle dropped from motorway pace to a crawl within two to three seconds after the impacts.

verdicts.evidence: The GPS speed at the start was [79.0 km/h](T4) and the compute_stats first_value is [79.0](T2), which matches "just under 80 km/h".

detect_events found a sustained decel on accel_x from [8.15 s to 9.92 s](T3) and compute_stats reports accel_x integrated delta-V of [-67.8 km/h](T2), indicating gradual deceleration over seconds before impact.
The sensors show deceleration prior to impact ([8.15 s to 9.92 s](T3)) but do not contain any channel describing traffic ahead; therefore timing relative to traffic slowdown is [unverifiable].
detect_events identified two impact spikes on accel_x at [9.2 s](T3) and [10.17 s](T3) about [0.97 s apart] (difference between [10.17 s] and [9.2 s] in T3).
GPS speed dropped from [70.0 km/h at 8.0 s] to [43.0 km/h at 11.0 s] per detect_events (a [27.0 km/h] drop over [~3.0 s]) (T3) and the gps_speed samples show from [8.0 s:70.0] to [11.0 s:43.0] (T4).
gps_speed samples show speed fell from [70.0 km/h at 8.0 s] to [43.0 km/h at 11.0 s] (T4), i.e. motorway pace to a much lower crawl within [~3 s] (T3).

result.rationale: Telemetry shows initial speed of [79.0 km/h](T2/T4), a sustained deceleration interval [8.15–9.92 s](T3), two impact spikes at [9.2 s] and [10.17 s](T3) about [0.97 s] apart, and GPS speed falling from [70.0 km/h] to [43.0 km/h] over [~3 s] (T3/T4), supporting the narrative; relation to traffic ahead is unverifiable.

result.notes: 100 Hz IMU over a 16 s window. Units: accel g, gyro deg/s, speed km/h. Device-to-vehicle axis alignment is NOT documented; do not assume which axis is longitudinal without cross-checking against GPS speed.

accel_x.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_y.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_z.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

detections.note: direction ambiguous: device axis orientation undocumented
rollover-suspect if on a roll/pitch axis; axis frame undocumented

result.thresholds_doc: impact spike: |a-baseline|>2.5g (>=20ms, merged<0.25s); sustained: 0.5s-avg in 0.35-1.2g; rotation: >40.0deg/s for 0.3s; net rotation >60.0deg; speed drop: >=15.0km/h in <=3.0s; brake: 0->1 transitions; CISS impact: max |crash-pulse delta-V|

result.downsampling: per-bucket sample with the largest |deviation from channel median| is kept
